This armor was taken from Evander the Mountainbreaker, a bounty Hunter from the Thorne Empire who wanders the Bronze Sea.

Mountainbreaker Cape.Description: A torn red cape that was taken from Evander the Mountainbreaker, a bounty hunter from the Thorne Empire who wanders the Bronze Sea.

The Lost Crown of Ravenna.Name: The Lost Crown of Ravenna
The Lost Crown of Ravenna.Description: A crown made out of sun-forged bronze, a technique invented by the Samerians. It was specifically made for King Calvus IV, the Third King of Ravenna, and was stolen from him after he was killed in Ravenna Castello, at the heart of the Ravenna Realm in the Bronze Sea.

Ravenna Fallen King Armor.Name: Ravenna Fallen King Armor

Mantello of Ravenna's Fallen King.Name: Mantello of Ravenna's Fallen King
